# Staubli — Quick-Disconnect Couplings for ADC
Last updated: 2026-03-25

## UQD (Universal Quick Disconnect)
- OCP-compliant, NVIDIA-APPROVED
- Sizes: DN4 to DN50
- Pressure: 16 bar (232 PSI) small, 10 bar (145 PSI) large
- Flow: 8.5-53+ LPM depending on size
- DRIP-FREE — exceeds OCP spec
- For rack-level liquid cooling connections

## UQDB Blind-Mate
- Same valve tech + guide cone
- +/-1mm self-alignment + floating mount
- Tool-free hot-swap
- For behind-blade connections (can't see the port)

## Bulkhead / Panel-Mount
- Available for container wall penetrations
- Engineered-to-order (not catalog SKUs)
- For CDU-to-external-cooler connections through container wall

## Competitors
- CEJN, Danfoss Hansen, CPC all make OCP UQD couplings
- Staubli has the NVIDIA approval edge

## Product page: staubli.com/us/en/fluid-connectors/products/quick-and-dry-disconnect-couplings/thermal-management/
